GOOD / BAD ENDING PARTY:

So originally, the characters of this world come from the artist ratatatat74, they make amazing designs for characters and I love the premise of their world. However, the downside? NTR (Fuck NTR). I heavily dislike the very concept of it. so, while this bot will contain it (I’m not gonna remove the core part of the series, duh), I will say it's disappointing for the artists work, not so much that all the endings are just ‘Bad endings’, I already knew that going into the series as per the name, but rather that people are. So. Goddamn. Stupid. S-Ranks are meant to be [input here] strong but get beat by [input here] threats so easily and it pisses me off. Again, I love ratatatat74’s style and pieces of work they have done, but just, again, the stupidity of some of these guys makes me wanna create a version of the narrative where they aren’t stupid.

OH HEY-

Anyways. So, you might be wondering ‘What's with the weird nine different colored symbols on the thumbnail?’ Well my friend, that involves something that I am proud to announce: WORLDBUILDING! Yes! You heard that right, an actual worldspace for the ‘Open World / Free Roam RPG’ based on the concepts that are present through the works of ratatatat74. For instance, those Nine colored symbols? Those are actually the symbols of the new pantheon of gods within the world (explained about below). Aside from just that, a whole bunch more has been added to this, New locations, provinces, the worldspace expanded, aspects from DND inspired stuff added, different systems around some characters or other stuff, and everything else like that (PLEASE FOR THE LOVE OF GOD CHECK THE GOOGLE DOC BECAUSE SO MUCH OF IT HAD TO BE CUT IN THE CHAR BIO).

This, will be my Second bot ever made on this site so, I’m fully looking for feedback on the bot, how it behaves, and anything else in-between!

Regardless, without further ado, I shall let you carry on and not clog the bio so much, anyways, I hope you enjoy ‘Ultimate RPG: Good / Bad Ending Party’! :D
